news.t: Charts Suggest Mega-Cap Stocks Are Headed Higher

holdings.infoBox: IOO is an equity ETF with a total of 117 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 12.51%, Apple at 10.72%, Microsoft at 7.28%, Amazon.com at 5.85%, and Alphabet at 5.29%.

overview.description: The iShares Global 100 ETF (IOO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global 100 index. The fund tracks an index of 100 large-cap multinational stocks selected by the S&P Committee. IOO was launched on Dec 5, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Charts Suggest Mega-Cap Stocks Are Headed Higher
data.text: Charts of some of the world's largest corporations are showing signs of moving higher.
